subcodes.title: Words to Myron Phelps and Madame Canavarro in Dec. 1902
subcodes.first_line: Today we will occupy ourselves with the glad tidings of God. It is for us to consider how we may educate men that the darkness of ignorance
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @material world a reflection of the spiritual, @spiritualization of humanity in the future; a new race of men, @call to action, @unity; oneness of humanity, @universal peace; world unity
